ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the training program */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the training period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the training period */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute hosting the training */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the training program */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main objectives of the training program */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user (trainer) responsible for the training */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the training is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the training (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainings_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institute */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institute */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institute */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institute's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute the participant belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the participant is part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the participant within their department */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the agricultural field */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant registering for the training */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program being registered for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the training */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the material is associated with */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., presentation, handout) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the material was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the material */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material is mandatory for the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the assessment is for */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, exam) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "maximum_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score possible for the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assessment */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assessment is mandatory for the training */,
  "weightage" INTEGER /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_assessments" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant's performance record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the participant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant submitted the assessment */,
  "is_pass" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant passed the assessment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the trainer on the participant's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_assessments_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant receiving the certificate */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the certificate is for */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of certificate (e.g., completion, excellence) */,
  "is_printed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the certificate has been printed and issued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the feedback */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the feedback is for */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer who delivered the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., participant outcomes, program impact) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is the final version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute the department is part of */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer providing the feedback */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the feedback is for */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the trainer */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the trainer for the training delivery */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_feedback_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES trainings ("training_id")
)
